# Step 01 — PO List (Purchaser View)

**Persona:** Purchaser (Purchasing Staff / Buyer)
**Module:** 1
**Section:** 1.1
**Route:** `/procurement/purchase-order`

---

## 1.1 Access Path

1. Log in as `purchase@zebra.com`
2. Navigate to **Procurement → Purchase Order** in the left sidebar

---

## 1.2 Flow Position

```mermaid
graph TD
    list["1. PO List"] --> create["2. Create PO"]
    create -->|"Blank / Manual"| detail["3. PO Detail"]
    create -->|"From Price List"| pricelist["2a. Price List Wizard"]
    create -->|"From PR"| frompr["2b. From PR Wizard"]
    pricelist --> detail
    frompr --> detail
    detail -->|Edit| edit["4. Edit Mode"]
    edit -->|Submit| inprog(["IN PROGRESS — Pending FC Approval"])
    style list fill:#1a56db,color:#fff,stroke:#1a56db
```

---

## 1.3 Screen Layout

```
┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ Purchase Order  ●2                                             │
│ Manage purchase orders.                                        │
│                                                                │
│ [🔍 Search...]          [All ▼] [Type ▼] [My pending] [All Docs]│
│                                                [⊞] [≡] [⊡]   │
│                                                                │
│ # │ PO No. ↕  │ Vendor ↕ │ Type  │ Order Date ↕│ Del.Date ↕  │
│   │           │          │       │             │             │
│ 1 │PO20260400002│เขมิกา…น.ส.│Manual │ 2026-04-07 │ 2026-04-30  │
│   │           │          │       │ DRAFT       │    300.00 USD│
│ 2 │PO20260300029│โกลบอล…บจก.│Manual │ 2026-03-24 │ 2026-03-30  │
│   │           │          │       │ IN PROGRESS │   49.28 THB  │
│                                                                │
│ Showing 1–2 of 2  Rows [10 ▼]        Page 1 of 1, 2 results  │
└────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

![PO List — default view](data:image/png;base64,)

![PO List — All Documents view (53 POs, all statuses)](data:image/png;base64,)

---

## 1.4 Page Header

| Element | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| Title | "Purchase Order" |
| Subtitle | "Manage purchase orders." |
| Count badge | Orange circle — number of POs in the current filtered view |
| Export | Button (disabled when no selection) |
| Print | Button (disabled when no selection) |
| Add Purchase Order | Primary blue button — opens Create PO modal |

---

## 1.5 Filter & Search Controls

| Control | Type | Description |
|---------|------|-------------|
| Search box | Text input | Filters table by PO number; requires Search button click |
| Status filter | Dropdown | All / DRAFT / IN PROGRESS / Approved / etc. |
| Type filter | Button + dropdown | Filters by creation type (Manual / From Price List / From PR) |
| My pending | Toggle button | Shows only the current user's POs needing action |
| All Documents | Toggle button | Shows all POs regardless of assignee |
| Toggle columns | Icon button | Show/hide individual columns |
| List view / Grid view | Icon buttons | Switch between table and card layout |

---

## 1.6 Table Columns

| Column | Description | Sortable |
|--------|-------------|---------|
| # | Row number; resets per page | No |
| PO No. | PO identifier as clickable button; navigates to PO detail | Yes |
| Vendor | Vendor name | Yes |
| Type | Creation method badge (orange "Manual", "From PR", "From Price List") | No |
| Order Date | PO creation date (YYYY-MM-DD) | Yes |
| Delivery Date | Expected delivery date | Yes |
| Status | Current status badge | No |
| Total Amount | PO total in PO currency | Yes |
| Currency | PO currency code | No |
| Row actions | "···" button — opens contextual action menu | No |

---

## 1.7 Status Values

| Status | Badge Color | Description |
|--------|-------------|-------------|
| DRAFT | Grey (outline) | Created but not yet submitted for approval |
| IN PROGRESS | Yellow/Gold | Submitted; pending FC approval; also shown when returned by FC for revision |
| SENT | Teal/green | FC approved; PO sent to vendor |
| COMPLETED | Green (bright) | Vendor has fulfilled the order |
| CLOSED | Dark grey/charcoal | PO manually closed by Purchaser after approval |
| VOIDED | Red/muted | PO was deleted or closed with zero items received; system records the cancellation as a void |

---

## 1.8 Row Actions Menu

Click the "···" button at the end of any row to reveal quick actions.

The row actions menu contains only one item across all PO statuses:

| Action | Color | Available On |
|--------|-------|--------------|
| Delete | Red | DRAFT, IN PROGRESS, SENT, COMPLETED, CLOSED |

> ⚠️ **Note:** Delete is available via the row menu for all statuses. Whether the system enforces additional guards (e.g., preventing deletion of COMPLETED or CLOSED POs) is enforced server-side and not visible in the UI menu.

![Row actions menu — DRAFT](data:image/png;base64,)

![Row actions menu — IN PROGRESS](data:image/png;base64,)

![Row actions menu — SENT](data:image/png;base64,)

![Row actions menu — COMPLETED](data:image/png;base64,)

![Row actions menu — CLOSED](data:image/png;base64,)

---

## 1.9 Pagination

| Element | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| Showing X–Y of Z | Record range indicator |
| Rows per page | Dropdown — default 10 |
| Page indicator | "Page X of Y, showing Z results" |

---

## 1.10 Business Rules

| # | Rule | Reference |
|---|------|-----------|
| BR-01 | Purchaser sees only POs assigned to their property | Role permission |
| BR-02 | "My pending" default shows the current buyer's own POs | List filter default |
| BR-03 | PO number button navigates to PO detail | FR-PO-001 |
| BR-04 | Export and Print are disabled unless a selection is active | UI pattern |

---

## 1.11 Edge Cases

| Scenario | System Behaviour |
|----------|-----------------|
| No POs exist | Table shows empty state |
| Search with no match | Table empty; pagination shows "Showing 0 of 0" |
| More than 10 POs | Pagination controls appear |
| PO submitted by another buyer | Visible under All Documents; not in My pending |
| Click All Documents then PO number | Navigates to PO detail regardless of ownership |
| Status filter set to DRAFT then IN PROGRESS PO exists | IN PROGRESS row is hidden |

---

## 1.12 Navigation

| Action | Destination |
|--------|-------------|
| Click PO No. button | Step 03 — PO Detail (view mode) |
| Click Add Purchase Order | Step 02 — Create PO (modal) |
| Click My pending | Filtered list (current buyer's POs) |
| Click All Documents | Full list (all POs in property) |

---

## 1.13 API Endpoints

| Method | Endpoint | Purpose |
|--------|----------|---------|
| GET | `/api/procurement/purchase-order` | Fetch PO list with filters |
| GET | `/api/procurement/purchase-order?filter=my_pending` | Fetch current user's pending POs |
